Dnshrtrd.description: Daily share trading volume; 0 means no traded volume.

Dsmvosd.description: Daily float market value, computed as float shares multiplied by closing price.

Trdsta.description: Trading status code: 1=normal, 2=ST, 3=*ST, 4=S (post-2006-10-09 reform incomplete), 5=SST, 6=S*ST, 7=G (pre-2006-10-09 reform completed), 8=GST, 9=G*ST, 10=U (pre-2006-10-09 reform incomplete), 11=UST, 12=U*ST, 13=N, 14=NST, 15=N*ST, 16=PT.

PreClosePrice.description: Previous close price from exchange feed (already adjusted for ex-rights/ex-dividend handling).

ChangeRatio.description: Daily change ratio computed as Clsprc / PreClosePrice - 1.
